goal: Migrate all remaining commands off STATE.md, update documentation, and delete STATE.md entirely.

tasks.name: Migrate core workflow commands (discuss, plan, implement, team)
tasks.action: Remove STATE.md read/write steps from all four commands. Replace context reads with memory prime(). Remove Update State sections.

tasks.name: Migrate remaining commands (ship, close, verify, verify-ci, rollback, review)
tasks.action: Remove STATE.md write steps from all six commands. Replace review.md feature detection with memory query.

tasks.name: Update documentation and delete STATE.md
tasks.action: Remove all STATE.md references across primary documentation and workflow support files (.claude/CLAUDE.md, CLAUDE.md, README.md, scripts/memory/context.py, scripts/workflow_checks.py). Update memory engine description from 'Optional' to 'Required'. Delete docs/planning/STATE.md.
verify: grep -c 'STATE.md' .claude/CLAUDE.md CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null; test $? -ne 0 && echo 'Clean' || echo 'References remain'
test ! -f docs/planning/STATE.md && echo 'STATE.md deleted' || echo 'STATE.md still exists'

planVerify: grep -rl 'STATE.md' --include='*.md' --include='*.py' --include='*.sh' . 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'kill-state-md/' | grep -v '.git/' | wc -l | xargs test 0 -eq && echo 'Project is STATE.md-free' || echo 'References remain'
commitMessage: feat(kill-state-md): remove STATE.md entirely — memory is single source of truth
